types.rust: struct SearchRequest { origin: String, destination: String, date: String, num_passengers: i32 }
types.notes: Direct translation of value type with owned String fields

types.rust: struct Flight { carrier: String, flight_no: String, origin: String, destination: String, dep_time: String, arr_time: String }
types.notes: Direct translation of value type with owned String fields

types.rust: struct Fare { carrier: String, origin: String, destination: String, base_price: f64, fare_class: String }
types.notes: Direct translation of value type with owned String fields

types.rust: struct Itinerary { legs: Vec<Flight>, total_price: f64, pricing_details: Option<String> }
struct CacheKey { origin: String, destination: String, date: String, num_passengers: i32 }
types.notes: Direct translation of value type with owned String fields

types.rust: struct LogicalEntity { flights: Vec<Flight>, fares: Vec<Fare> }
struct SearchResults { itineraries: Vec<Itinerary>, status: SearchStatus, was_from_cache: bool, processing_time_ms: f64, message: Option<String> }

ownership.rationale: Rust structs directly map to C++ value types with owned data

error_paths.source: No explicit error handling in C++
error_paths.rust: Result<T, E> will be used for error handling in Rust implementation

functions.name: SearchRequest::SearchRequest
pre: orig, dest, dt are valid strings

functions.name: SearchRequest::operator==
post: Returns true if all fields are equal

functions.name: SearchRequest::toString
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is string length

functions.name: Flight::operator==
post: Returns true if all fields are equal

functions.name: Flight::toString
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is string length

functions.name: Fare::operator==
post: Returns true if all fields are equal

functions.name: Fare::toString
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is string length

functions.name: Itinerary::Itinerary
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of legs

functions.name: Itinerary::operator==
post: Returns true if legs and totalPrice are equal
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of legs

functions.name: Itinerary::toString
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is string length

functions.name: CacheKey::CacheKey
pre: orig, dest, dt are valid strings

functions.name: CacheKey::fromRequest
post: Returns CacheKey initialized from request fields

functions.name: CacheKey::operator==
post: Returns true if all fields are equal

functions.name: CacheKey::operator<
post: Returns true if fields are in order

functions.name: CacheKey::toString
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is string length

functions.name: LogicalEntity::LogicalEntity
pre: flts and frs are valid vectors
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of flights and fares

functions.name: LogicalEntity::isEmpty
post: Returns true if flights or fares are empty

functions.name: LogicalEntity::getCombinationCount
post: Returns product of flights and fares sizes

functions.name: LogicalEntity::operator==
post: Returns true if flights and fares are equal
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of flights and fares

functions.name: LogicalEntity::toString
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is string length

functions.name: SearchResults::sortByPrice
functions.complexity: O(n log n) where n is number of itineraries

functions.name: SearchResults::toString
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is string length

invariants: SearchRequest must have non-empty origin, destination, and date
Flight must have valid depTime <= arrTime
Itinerary legs must be non-empty if totalPrice > 0
LogicalEntity must have non-empty flights or fares
SearchResults itineraries must be sorted by price if sortByPrice called

concurrency.thread_safety: All types are single-threaded with no shared state

raw_spec:
types:
  - cpp: "SearchRequest"
    rust: "struct SearchRequest { origin: String, destination: String, date: String, num_passengers: i32 }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Direct translation of value type with owned String fields"

  - cpp: "Flight"
    rust: "struct Flight { carrier: String, flight_no: String, origin: String, destination: String, dep_time: String, arr_time: String }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Direct translation of value type with owned String fields"

  - cpp: "Fare"
    rust: "struct Fare { carrier: String, origin: String, destination: String, base_price: f64, fare_class: String }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Direct translation of value type with owned String fields"

  - cpp: "Itinerary"
    rust: "struct Itinerary { legs: Vec<Flight>, total_price: f64, pricing_details: Option<String> }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Vec for legs, owned fields"

  - cpp: "CacheKey"
    rust: "struct CacheKey { origin: String, destination: String, date: String, num_passengers: i32 }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Direct translation of value type with owned String fields"

  - cpp: "LogicalEntity"
    rust: "struct LogicalEntity { flights: Vec<Flight>, fares: Vec<Fare> }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Vec for flights and fares"

  - cpp: "SearchResults"
    rust: "struct SearchResults { itineraries: Vec<Itinerary>, status: SearchStatus, was_from_cache: bool, processing_time_ms: f64, message: Option<String> }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Vec for itineraries, owned fields"

ownership:
  - cpp_pattern: "Value types with no pointers"
    rust_pattern: "Structs with owned fields"
    rationale: "Rust structs directly map to C++ value types with owned data"

error_paths:
  - source: "No explicit error handling in C++"
    recovery: "None"
    rust: "Result<T, E> will be used for error handling in Rust implementation"

functions:
  - name: "SearchRequest::SearchRequest"
    pre: ["orig, dest, dt are valid strings", "pax >= 0"]
    post: ["origin == orig", "destination == dest", "date == dt", "num_passengers == pax"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "SearchRequest::operator=="
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns true if all fields are equal"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "SearchRequest::toString"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns properly formatted string"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is string length"

  - name: "Flight::Flight"
    pre: ["All string parameters are valid"]
    post: ["All fields initialized correctly"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "Flight::operator=="
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns true if all fields are equal"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "Flight::toString"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns properly formatted string"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is string length"

  - name: "Fare::Fare"
    pre: ["All string parameters are valid", "price >= 0"]
    post: ["All fields initialized correctly"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "Fare::operator=="
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns true if all fields are equal"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "Fare::toString"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns properly formatted string"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is string length"

  - name: "Itinerary::Itinerary"
    pre: ["flightLegs is valid vector"]
    post: ["legs initialized with flightLegs", "totalPrice == 0.0"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of legs"

  - name: "Itinerary::addLeg"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["flight added to legs"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "Itinerary::operator=="
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns true if legs and totalPrice are equal"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of legs"

  - name: "Itinerary::toString"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns properly formatted string"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is string length"

  - name: "CacheKey::CacheKey"
    pre: ["orig, dest, dt are valid strings", "pax >= 0"]
    post: ["All fields initialized correctly"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "CacheKey::fromRequest"
    pre: ["req is valid SearchRequest"]
    post: ["Returns CacheKey initialized from request fields"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "CacheKey::operator=="
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns true if all fields are equal"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "CacheKey::operator<"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns true if fields are in order"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "CacheKey::toString"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns properly formatted string"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is string length"

  - name: "LogicalEntity::LogicalEntity"
    pre: ["flts and frs are valid vectors"]
    post: ["flights and fares initialized correctly"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of flights and fares"

  - name: "LogicalEntity::isEmpty"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns true if flights or fares are empty"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "LogicalEntity::getCombinationCount"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns product of flights and fares sizes"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "LogicalEntity::operator=="
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns true if flights and fares are equal"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of flights and fares"

  - name: "LogicalEntity::toString"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns properly formatted string"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is string length"

  - name: "SearchResults::addItinerary"
    pre: ["itin is valid Itinerary"]
    post: ["itinerary added to itineraries"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "SearchResults::sortByPrice"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["itineraries sorted by totalPrice"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies itineraries order"]
    complexity: "O(n log n) where n is number of itineraries"

  - name: "SearchResults::toString"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns properly formatted string"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is string length"

invariants:
  - "SearchRequest must have non-empty origin, destination, and date"
  - "Flight must have valid depTime <= arrTime"
  - "Fare must have basePrice >= 0"
  - "Itinerary legs must be non-empty if totalPrice > 0"
  - "LogicalEntity must have non-empty flights or fares"
  - "SearchResults itineraries must be sorted by price if sortByPrice called"

concurrency:
  thread_safety: "All types are single-threaded with no shared state"
  shared_state: ["None"]

dependencies:
  - "std::string -> String"
  - "std::vector -> Vec"
  - "<sstream> -> std::fmt"
  - "<algorithm> -> std::sort"
  - "<iomanip> -> std::fmt"
